scope: AIO future roadmap implementation wave: governance lock, runtime activation, UI/UX taxonomy, standards drift automation, and policy catalog expansion.

workflow_gaps: Roadmap policy catalogs for rendering/search/memory/automation safety were not previously enforced by baseline gate.
Stage runtime selection could run without benchmark auto-selection evidence.
UI/UX blueprint gate lacked explicit component taxonomy coverage for boxes/forms/grids/navigation/state messaging/error recovery.
Standards drift automation existed for governance failures but not dedicated standards drift signals.
naming_or_policy_issues: Automation policy previously depended on required_days/required_hours schedule slots.
ISO evidence index lacked direct links to the new roadmap policy catalogs.
Preflight catalog inventory omitted new policy catalogs.

alternatives.summary: Minimal patch: add docs and leave existing gates unchanged.
risks: No automatic enforcement of roadmap contracts

alternatives.summary: Enforcement-first wave: add catalogs, wire baseline/ISO/UIUX gates, enforce runtime activation evidence, and add standards drift automation.
benefits: Converts roadmap into blocking machine-enforced contracts
Preserves existing pipeline while extending governance coverage
Provides issue automation for standards drift
risks: Higher initial gate strictness may fail existing stale artifacts
Requires coordinated docs and catalog updates

alternatives.summary: Large rewrite now: immediate native renderer and full search architecture replacement in one pass.

recommended.reason: Best balance of aggressive progress and enforceable safety: introduces strict governance controls without bypassing existing pipeline and evidence artifacts.

required_edits.intent: Add polyglot runtime activation policy and required roadmap catalogs.
Switch automation governance to condition-gated mode and require new catalogs.
Define machine-readable UI component taxonomy contracts.
Define native-first rendering policy, glTF interchange, and budgets.
Define hybrid lexical/vector/graph query routing policy.
Define memory budgets, cache tiering, and deterministic data lifecycle controls.
Define policy-gated automation safety and speech interaction controls.
Enforce new catalogs and benchmark-selected runtime activation evidence.
Require and validate component taxonomy coverage in UI/UX blueprint gate.
Wire new catalogs into standards evidence links by domain.
Create condition-triggered standards drift monitoring with maintenance issue automation.
Require new catalogs and default runtime auto-best preflight behavior.
Default workflow runtime selection to benchmark auto-best.
